title: Pix (Jedi)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image=[[File:PixPls.png]] |name=Pix |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]''[[Jedi: Yoda]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin=Dark |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] |masters=[[Tyr]] |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Hit the tanks and speeders first! Let's end this before it can start!|Pix|}} '''Pix''', a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]], was a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the last [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Pix and her fellow [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] were commissioned as [[Officer/Legends|officers]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] as a result of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]—a [[The galaxy/Legends|pan-galactic]] civil war between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. Promoted to the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Jedi Commander]], Pix served alongside her [[Jedi Master/Legends|master]], [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Tyr]], until he was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by a suicide [[Bomber/Legends|bomber]] on the [[Sephi/Legends|Sephi]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Thustra/Legends|Thustra]]. As the situation grew dire, [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] attempted to end the conflict through diplomacy, leaving Pix in command of the [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Army/Legends|army]] while he negotiated with [[King/Legends|King]] [[Alaric (Sephi)|Alaric]] in person. Despite the parlay between their leaders, the Sephi forces gathered just beyond the range of the [[Thustra Republic command center|Republic command center's]] defenses, leading [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Clutch (clone)|Clutch]] to believe that they were preparing to launch another attack. The clone advised Pix to strike first, but the Padawan was under strict orders from Yoda to not engage the Sephi in his absence. Later on, she was led to believe that Alaric betrayed the truce by having Yoda executed. Deceived by [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Navi]], the [[Galaxy/Legends|galactic]] representative of Thustra, [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] Pix led her [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] into battle, attempting to overtake the enemy and capture [[Alaric's palace]] before the Sephi could counterattack the [[Republic Military/Legends|Republic Military]]. The [[Battle of Thustra]] ultimately galvanized sympathy for the Sephi, fully integrating Thustra and its allies into the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist cause]] despite the Republic's efforts to keep them in line. In the aftermath of the battle, Pix and Yoda returned to Republic [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] where they revealed Navi's deception to the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]], resulting in the senator's [[Prisoner/Legends|arrest]] on the charges of conspiracy and [[Treason/Legends|treason]]. ==Biography== ===Clone Wars=== {{Quote|Calling Coruscant. Situation critical on Thustra. Sephi forces have penetrated our defenses. Our command center has been destroyed. Cal and I are safe, but Master Tyr and Master Tyffix… Our Masters are dead.|Pix|}} [[File:Yoda_arrives_Thustra.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The Jedi commanders Pix and Cal were sent to Thustra, where they awaited military reinforcements from Coruscant.]] Pix was a member of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] taken on by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Tyr]] as his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] learner during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Like the other [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] apprentices, she was granted the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Jedi Commander]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] as [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] became engulfed by the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''{{TCW|Heroes on Both Sides}}The events of ''[[Jedi: Yoda]]'' take place shortly after [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi's]] escape from [[Rattatak/Legends|Rattatak]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to sixteen [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], which according to ''The New Essential Chronology'' took place in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. This places the [[battle of Thustra]] in [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]]. she accompanied her master to the [[planet]] [[Thustra]], at the head of an [[Army/Legends|army]] of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], to present a small show of force against the [[Sephi/Legends|Sephi]] who were on the verge of seceding from the Republic. Within ten [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] of the Republic's arrival, the Sephi attacked the offworlders using suicide tactics to inflict heavy losses on the Republic. A suicide [[Bomber/Legends|bomber]] succeeded in [[Death/Legends|killing]] the [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi generals]] Tyr and [[Tyffix]], although Pix's life was saved by her master [[Standard second|seconds]] before the enemy [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] crashed into the [[Thustra Republic command center|Republic command center]]. Having lost two [[General/Legends|generals]] and a portion of their [[Troop/Legends|troops]], Pix sent a transmission to the Republic [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] requesting the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] to send reinforcements. At the [[Time/Legends|time]] she and her fellow Padawan, [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Cal (Jedi)|Cal]], were expecting an army led by either [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] or [[Oppo Rancisis/Legends|Oppo Rancisis]] to come to their aid. To their surprise, however, it was [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] who came to Thustra. The ancient Jedi Master did not bring additional [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] as Pix requested; Yoda had hoped that he would be able to negotiate an end to hostilities with [[King/Legends|King]] [[Alaric (Sephi)|Alaric]], the [[Monarchy/Legends|sovereign ruler]] of Thustra. As such, he journeyed to the capital [[City/Legends|city]] with Cal at his side, leaving Pix and [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Clutch (clone)|Clutch]]{{CSWECite|I|132|Clutch, Commander (TK-571)}} in charge of the remaining [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] troopers. ====Battle of Thustra==== {{Quote|Technically, you're in command here. We can't move without your order. Perhaps we should contact Coruscant and request another general…''"
"''No. Let's go.|Clutch and Pix|}} [[File:Pix-Clutch-Thustra.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The battle of Thustra began with a Republic preemptive strike, led by Jedi Commander Pix and Clone Commander Clutch.]] As Pix and Clutch awaited Yoda's return, the two [[Officer/Legends|officers]] noticed a force of Sephi [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] amassing near the Republic army's position. The clone [[Advisor/Legends|advised]] his Jedi commander to attack the Sephi first, having deemed this course of action as the most strategically sound option given the circumstances. Pix balked at Clutch's suggestion as it contradicted the direct orders of their Jedi general. Clutch stood by his recommendation, believing that Yoda's strategy conflicted with their ability to defend themselves. Nevertheless, they refrained from attacking the Sephi until [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Navi]]—the [[Galaxy/Legends|galactic]] representative of Thustra—arrived at the Republic's [[Second Republic command center|new command center]]. Hoping to prevent his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] from seceding from the Republic, Navi deceived Pix into believing that Yoda and Cal had been lured to [[Alaric's palace]] and executed on the king's orders. As a result, Clutch believed that open war had become inevitable but could not give the order to attack without Pix's approval, given that she was the highest-ranking officer in Yoda's absence. He recommended requesting another general from Coruscant, but Pix silenced him by ordering the clone troopers to attack the Sephi. Pix and Clutch led the Republic attack from a [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry]] [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]]. Their preemptive strike succeeded in catching the Sephi unprepared; Commander [[Dekluun]] was among the casualties sustained by the Sephi army. As the Republic achieved air supremacy with the use of their gunships, the clone [[Infantry/Legends|infantry]] moved forward to control the field with the support of [[All Terrain Tactical Enforcer/Legends|AT-TE]] and [[Self-Propelled Heavy Artillery|SPHA]] [[Walker/Legends|walkers]]. Pix and Clutch fought alongside each other on the front lines while simultaneously relaying orders to the clone troopers, commanding them to eliminate the enemy's [[Tank/Legends|tanks]] and [[Speeder/Legends|speeders]] as they advanced on the capital. As the fighting continued, Pix had a bad feeling about both the battle and the senator. In the aftermath, Pix and Clutch returned to Coruscant with Yoda, who was revealed to be alive and well despite Senator Navi's claims. Entering the [[Grand Convocation Chamber]] of the [[Senate Building/Legends|Senate Building]], they accused Navi of [[Treason/Legends|treason]] before the entire [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]]. Pix witnessed the [[Politics/Legends|politician's]] fall from grace while standing at Mace Windu's side, watching as Clutch personally arrested Navi with the help two [[Senate Guard/Legends|Senate Guards]]. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Strategically, our best chance to hit them is now, before they can fully form up.''"
"''We can't do that. Master Yoda's orders were—''"
"''I know…but we can't wait here indefinitely. Soon we'll have to choose between following General Yoda's orders…and saving our own lives.|Clutch and Pix|}} [[File:Pix.png|thumb|left|250px|Pix was a young Jedi who fought for the Galactic Republic during the Clone Wars.]] Pix was a [[Color/Legends|dark]]-skinned, brown-[[Eye/Legends|eyed]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]], with long black [[Hair/Legends|hair]] that she boxbraided into a ponytail.{{CSWECite|III|28|Pix}} She was loyal to both the Jedi Order and the Galactic Republic, fighting for both institutions against rebellious worlds that supported the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|secessionist]] cause of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. She was also loyal to her master, General Tyr, who taught her the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] prior to the battle of Thustra. After witnessing the death of her mentor via a suicide attack, Pix mourned Tyr's death and attempted to comfort Cal, a fellow Padawan whose own master, Tyffix, also perished. She then took the initiative to report the situation on Thustra to Coruscant, but was reprimanded by Yoda for not informing him directly. Unlike Cal, who openly questioned Yoda's decision to use diplomacy instead of force, Pix attempted to follow the Grand Master's plan and initially resisted Commander Clutch's proposition to launch a preemptive strike against the Sephi. The thought of Yoda and Cal dying in a trap set by King Alaric left Pix feeling distressed and more open to the option of taking military action against the Sephi, as proposed by Senator Navi and Commander Clutch. During the attack, Pix embraced her role as a tactician and battlefield commander. As such, she issued orders to her clone troopers and, at the same time, fought alongside them. However, she soon expressed doubt in both the battle and Navi, who claimed that the king executed Yoda, as her army drew closer to the palace. At the time of the Clone Wars, Pix wielded a blue-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] but did not wear the [[Jedi apparel/Legends|traditional]] [[Robe/Legends|robes]] of the Jedi Order. Instead, her [[Clothing/Legends|attire]] consisted of a tight, short-sleeved blue top and a short, beige skirt. She also occasionally wore a light-colored Jedi [[Cloak/Legends|cloak]]. ==Powers and abilities== Pix was a [[Force-sensitive]] individual, and therefore, [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the Jedi arts. Her skills extended to the use [[Force power/Legends|Force techniques]] and [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber combat]], making her capable of deflecting [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] [[Fire/Legends|fire]] with a lightsaber. ==Behind the scenes== [[File:Darth_Homiiz.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A concept image of Darth Homiiz and Pix]] Pix first appeared in ''[[Jedi: Yoda]]'', a [[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] written by [[Jeremy Barlow]] and released in [[2004]]. In the comic, she was drawn by the [[Wikipedia:United States|American]] illustrator [[HOON]]. Pix was depicted in a concept art image, seen on HOON's website, where she is wearing a different attire and wields a [[Sword/Legends|sword]]-like weapon and standing next to a [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] named [[Darth Homiiz]].{{WebCite|url=http://www.messs.cc/gallery/SWCONCEPT/homi_esse_PIX_red_HOON|text=Star Wars Jedi Yoda Concept: Pix and Darth Homiiz|work=Mess Studio Art Gallery|archivedate=20070813071439}} In [[2008]], Pix received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''. ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi: Yoda]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Pix (Jedi)}} *''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Pix |pt=Legends:Pix }} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Jedi Commanders]] [[Category:Jedi trainees of the Jedi Order]]
